name: situate
description: Situate — an embeddable in-app feedback + UAT overlay platform (extracted from an internal app).

scripts.build: npm run build -w @situate/core && npm run build -w @situate/widget && npm run build -w @situate/server && npm run build -w @situate/admin
scripts.test: npm run test -w @situate/core && npm run test -w @situate/widget
